description_long: This is a well-worn, single-seat armchair upholstered in a distressed, brown leather or leather-like material. The seat and back cushions are thick and visibly padded, showing signs of use with uneven coloration and some darkened patches, suggesting age or heavy usage. The armrests are broad, fully upholstered, and integrated into the chair's boxy frame, providing substantial support on both sides. The backrest is straight and moderately high, matching the seat in material and wear, and the rear of the chair is plain with a subtle seam running vertically down the center. The legs are not distinctly visible, giving the impression that the chair sits low and solidly on the ground, possibly with short block feet. The overall appearance is robust and comfortable, suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or outdoor covered spaces.
description: A distressed brown leather armchair with thick, padded cushions and broad, fully upholstered armrests. The chair has a boxy, robust form and shows visible signs of wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide seat and back cushions, both heavily padded and visibly worn, with broad armrests on either side.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thick armrest and the depth of the seat cushion, as well as the distressed texture of the upholstery.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, slightly curved back with a central seam and the overall boxy silhouette of the chair.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, emphasizing the armrest's width and the chair's solid, low-to-the-ground profile.
attribute_armrest_design: broad, padded, and fully upholstered in distressed leather
attribute_backrest_style: straight, medium-high, padded, and fully upholstered
attribute_leg_type: no visible legs, likely short block feet or concealed base
attribute_upholstery_pattern: distressed solid color leather with visible wear and mottling
